description: '''Bubblegrunge''' is a fusion microgenre that combines elements of [[grunge]] and [[pop music]]. The genre's name is a [[portmanteau]] of the terms "[[bubblegum music]]" and "grunge". Practitioners of the style include [[Soccer Mommy]], [[Mannequin Pussy]], [[Slow Pulp]], and [[Ovlov]], with some disputed overlap between Bubblegrunge and more alternative rock and [[shoegaze]]-influenced expressions of genres such as [[Twee Pop]].
